meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Slashy
products.tagline: The AI assistant that does email for you
products.summaryZh: 为你处理邮件的AI助手
products.descriptionZh: Slashy 是一款原生 AI 邮件客户端与助手，能以你的口吻草拟回复、筛选重要事项、确保不遗漏后续跟进，让你减少在收件箱的时间，专注于真正重要的事。它连接你的邮箱、日历、CRM 和会议记录，学习你的工作方式，因此你可以让 Slashy 为下一次会议做准备、起草跟进邮件、清空收件箱、追踪谁还未回复，或在移动中通过 iMessage 或 Slack 快速发送邮件。
products.description: Slashy is an AI-native email client and assistant that drafts replies in your voice, triages what matters, and makes sure no follow-up slips, so you spend less time in your inbox and more time on what matters. It connects to your email, calendar, CRM, and meeting notes and learns how you work, so you can ask Slashy to prep you for your next meeting, draft a follow-up, clear your inbox to zero, track who still owes you a reply, or fire off an email from iMessage or Slack while you're on the go.

products.name: Taste Lab
products.tagline: Extract any website's design DNA
products.summaryZh: 提取任意网站的设计DNA
products.descriptionZh: 将你的AI代理指向任意网站。即可获得完整的设计拆解——颜色、字体、间距，以及每个决策背后的逻辑——随时可用于你的下一个项目。
products.description: Point your AI agent at any website. Get back a complete design breakdown — colors, type, spacing, and the reasoning behind every decision — ready to use in your next build.

products.name: Permute 4.0
products.tagline: The ultimate media converter for macOS
products.summaryZh: macOS 终极媒体转换工具
products.descriptionZh: Permute 是一款快速的图像、音频和视频转换工具。它支持所有格式的文件，因为 Permute 几乎能将任何内容转换为任何格式（几乎）。若想实现水变酒之类的转换，您得另寻他法，但媒体文件可以转换成您需要的任何格式。此外，Permute 还提供一些额外功能，例如将两个视频合并为一个，或添加字幕轨道。
products.description: Permute is a quick image, audio, and video converter. You can use it for files of all formats because Permute can convert anything into anything (almost). For water to water-to-wine conversion, you’d have to refer to other authorities, but media files can become whatever format you need them to. Plus, Permute also has some additional goodies like merging two videos into one or adding a subtitle track.

products.name: Cloudback for Linear
products.tagline: Automated backup and restore for Linear workspaces
products.summaryZh: Linear 工作区的自动备份与恢复
products.descriptionZh: Cloudback 为 Linear 工作区、GitHub、GitLab 和 Azure DevOps 提供基于快照的自动化备份。Linear 数据捕获覆盖 23 个数据类别：议题、项目、周期、文档、评论、附件、嵌入文件及工作区结构本身。可从任意备份按依赖顺序恢复至新目标工作区。采用 AES-256 加密，可选客户管理密钥（RSA Lockbox）。符合 SOC 2 Type II 标准。拥有 1700+ 客户、14000+ 仓库、400 万+ 备份。
products.description: Cloudback runs automated, snapshot-based backups for Linear workspaces, GitHub, GitLab, and Azure DevOps. Linear capture covers 23 data categories: issues, projects, cycles, documents, comments, attachments, embedded files, and the workspace structure itself. Restore in dependency order from any backup, into a new target workspace. AES-256 with optional customer-managed keys (RSA Lockbox). SOC 2 Type II compliant. 1.7k+ customers, 14k+ repositories, 4M+ backups.

products.name: Memoriq
products.tagline: Your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok
products.summaryZh: 你的私人AI记忆，适用于ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini和Grok。
products.descriptionZh: Memoriq 是专为 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 和 Grok 打造的私人 AI 记忆库。将重要的对话保存在端到端加密的保险库中，仅限您本人访问。开源、可自托管，专为不愿丢失宝贵 AI 对话、或不信任其他明文云服务的用户设计。搜索、整理，让您的 AI 知识尽在掌控。
products.description: Memoriq is your private AI memory for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Grok. Save the conversations that matter in an end-to-end encrypted vault that only you can access. Open source, self-hostable, and built for people who don't want to lose valuable AI chats or trust another plaintext cloud service. Search, organize, and keep your AI knowledge under your control.

products.name: Conan
products.tagline: A native Mac cockpit for Claude Code
products.summaryZh: Claude Code 的原生 Mac 驾驶舱
products.descriptionZh: Conan 是一款原生 macOS 应用，将 Claude Code 封装在实时 HUD 中——每次提示、工具调用、技能和 token 都会即时呈现。
products.description: Conan is a native macOS app that wraps Claude Code in a live HUD — every prompt, tool call, skill, and token, surfaced as it happens.

products.name: Pool
products.tagline: Save anything with a screenshot.
products.summaryZh: 用截图保存任何内容。
products.descriptionZh: 用截图保存一切！Pool 是一种保存和整理你捕捉内容的新方式。我们截图是为了记住——食谱、播客、产品、地点。但它们通常消失在相册中。Pool 将你的截图转化为结构化内容，让你可以整理、回顾并采取行动。使用 Pool，你可以：- 将截图整理到不同池中- 自动分类内容并找到原始链接- 与朋友分享池- 保持所有内容可搜索
products.description: Save anything with a screenshot! Pool is a new way to save and organize the things you capture. We take screenshots to remember - a recipe, a podcast, a product, a place. But they usually disappear in your camera roll. Pool turns your screenshots into structured content you can organize, revisit, and act on. With Pool, you can: - Organize screenshots into pools - Automatically categorize content and find the original links - Share pools with friends - Keep everything searchable

products.name: LabelLens
products.tagline: See Beyond the Label
products.summaryZh: 超越标签所见
products.descriptionZh: LabelLens利用AI分析包装食品标签。上传产品标签，即可即时获取成分解析、添加剂检测、营养洞察、甜味剂分析以及易懂的健康评分。无需自行解读令人困惑的配料表，LabelLens助你在购买前了解实际摄入的食物成分。
products.description: LabelLens analyzes packaged food labels using AI. Upload a product label and instantly get ingredient breakdowns, additive detection, nutrition insights, sweetener analysis, and an easy-to-understand health score. Instead of decoding confusing ingredient lists yourself, LabelLens helps you understand what you're actually eating before you buy.

products.name: Baroque
products.tagline: The canvas where AI designs your whole product
products.summaryZh: AI设计你整个产品的画布
products.descriptionZh: 每个AI工具给你的都是千篇一律的泛泛之作。同样的渐变、同样的布局，毫无灵魂。Baroque与众不同。真正的设计品味，融入每个界面。可复刻、可混搭、也可从零开始。一个画布承载你的整个产品，而非单个界面。
products.description: Every AI tool hands you the same generic slop. Same gradients, same layouts, no soul. Baroque is built different. Real design taste, baked into every screen. Recreate, remix, or start from scratch. One canvas for your whole product, not just one screen.

products.name: 1ClickReport — Marketing AI in Claude
products.tagline: Run Google Ads, Meta & GA4 from Claude — you approve
products.summaryZh: 通过Claude管理Google Ads、Meta和GA4——你只需确认
products.descriptionZh:
1ClickReport — 不只是汇报，而是真正执行营销的Claude  
自2025年11月Beta版以来新增两项功能：  
🆕 MCP集成 — 连接Google Ads、Meta、GA4、Search Console及Stripe。提问“我的预算浪费在哪里？”→ Claude会找出问题并直接处理（创建、暂停、调整）。每项变更需经你批准。  
🆕 24/7监控代理 — 设定规则（如“CPA超过50美元时提醒”），在聊天中确认后，每6小时运行一次，触发条件时发送邮件通知。  
⚡ 额外福利：60秒内生成AI仪表盘。7天免费试用，无需信用卡。
products.description: 1ClickReport — Claude that RUNS your marketing, not just reports on it Two upgrades since our Nov 2025 beta: 🆕 MCP integration — Connect Google Ads, Meta, GA4, Search Console & Stripe. Ask "where am I wasting spend?" → Claude finds it AND fixes it (create, pause, adjust). You approve every change. 🆕 24/7 monitoring agents — Set a rule ("alert if CPA > $50"), approve in chat, runs every 6h & emails on breach. ⚡ Bonus: AI dashboards in 60s. 7-day trial, no card.

products.name: DualChess
products.tagline: Chess — but a mini-game decides every capture
products.summaryZh: 国际象棋——但每次吃子都由一个小游戏决定
products.descriptionZh: 在线、本地或与AI（4个难度级别）对弈国际象棋——但规则有个变体：每次吃子都需通过快速反应小游戏决定胜负。落子并不保证吃子成功——你必须赢得乒乓、迷宫、速绘、记忆配对、靶心射击或拔河才能拿下棋子。策略与胆识并存，新手也能逆袭高手。支持实时在线对战、全球排行榜、可安装为应用——完全免费，浏览器即时运行。无需下载。
products.description: Play chess online, locally, or vs AI (4 levels) — but here's the twist: every capture is settled by a fast reflex mini-game. Lining up a piece doesn't guarantee the take — you have to win Pong, Labyrinth, Quick Draw, Memory Match, Target Practice or Tug of War to claim it. Strategy meets nerve, so even a beginner can upset a stronger player. Real-time online play, a global leaderboard, installable as an app — and free, running instantly in your browser. No download.

products.name: Chessie
products.tagline: Scan chess matches. Find better moves. Increase your elo.
products.summaryZh: 扫描棋局，寻找更优着法，提升你的等级分。
products.descriptionZh: Chessie是一款棋盘扫描与分析工具。它通过Stockfish引擎为你展示每一步的前10种最佳走法。无需联网，你的棋局始终属于你。
products.description: Chessie is a chessboard scanner and analyzer. It shows you the top 10 moves of every turn using Stockfish. No internet needed, your game stays yours.

products.name: Hive
products.tagline: Babysits your agents from idea to PR, letting you think
products.summaryZh: 从创意到公关全程托管你的智能体，让你专注思考
products.descriptionZh: Hive 协调 SOTA 编码代理（Claude/Codex/Pi）的工作，使其从构思到 PR 自主异步运行，而你只需提供关键的产品决策。这一切直接在终端中完成。因此，你无需同时盯着五个终端，而是可以将代理的监控工作外包给 Hive，专注于更有意义的事情。
products.description: Hive orchestrates work of SOTA coding agents (Claude/Codex/Pi), so they run autonomously and asynchronously from idea to PR, while you provide only the critical product decisions. Right in your terminal. So instead of watching 5 terminals, you can outsource agents babysitting to Hive and do something meaningful.

products.name: Web Researcher MCP
products.tagline: The AI research assistant that cites real sources honestly
products.summaryZh: 诚实地引用真实来源的AI研究助手
products.descriptionZh: 搜索整个网络，或缩小范围至你信任的站点：医学期刊、法院数据库、新闻媒体、学术论文。分析完整来源，而非片段。可用的链接、可信的引用，没有虚构的封闭花园预合成结果。你的AI会链接不存在的论文、编造DOI，并以与同行评审研究同等的自信呈现SEO垃圾信息。它甚至无法区分博客文章和法院文件。这个MCP解决了这个问题。
products.description: Search the entire web or narrow it down to just the sites you trust; medical journals, court databases, news outlets, academic papers. Analyze the full source, not just snippets. Links that work, citations you can trust, no made up closed garden pre-synthesized results. Your AI links to papers that don't exist, invents DOIs, and presents SEO spam with the same confidence as peer-reviewed research. It can't even tell a blog post from a court filing. This MCP solves it.

products.name: Roast My Resume
products.tagline: AI roasts your resume. You screenshot the trauma.
products.summaryZh: AI 对你的简历进行毒舌点评。你截图保存这份创伤。
products.descriptionZh: AI用说唱对战的气势吐槽你的简历。粘贴你的“7年扎实全栈经验”，看它翻译成“7年边干边编”。然后截图分享卡片。免费。匿名。轻度创伤。
products.description: AI roasts your resume with battle-rap energy. Paste your '7 years of robust full-stack experience' and watch it translate to '7 years of making stuff up as I go along.' Then screenshot the share card. Free. Anonymous. Mildly traumatic.

products.name: Athenic 2.0
products.tagline: A faster, smarter Athenic. Analyze on autopilot.
products.summaryZh: 更快、更智能的Athenic。自动分析。
products.descriptionZh: Athenic 是一款用于数据分析与工作自动化的AI代理。连接你的数据，用日常英语对话，即可生成仪表盘、报告和自动化流程。适用于从初创公司到世界500强企业。
products.description: Athenic is an AI agent for analyzing data and automating work. Connect your data, chat in plain English, and ship dashboards, reports, and automations. Built for startups to Fortune 500.

products.name: Allergo
products.tagline: Translate your allergies, anywhere.
products.summaryZh: 随时随地，应对过敏。
products.descriptionZh: Allergo 可帮助您创建涵盖 75 种以上语言/国家的过敏翻译卡片。将卡片添加至 Apple Wallet，随时随地快速取用。功能还包括对话辅助和紧急 SOS 翻译，并会根据用户所在地自动进行翻译。专为实际使用场景设计，适配不同国家的本地化需求。专业翻译及更多母语者验证功能即将通过无线更新推出。专为有过敏或饮食限制的旅行者打造。
products.description: Allergo helps you create allergy translation cards for 75+ languages/countries. Add cards to Apple Wallet for quick access anywhere. Features also include conversation helpers and emergency SOS translations, automatically translated to the users location. Designed for real-world use, with localisation across countries. Professional translations, and more native speaker verifications, are coming soon via over-the-air updates. Built for anyone travelling with allergies or dietary restrictions.

products.name: Reverie.fm
products.tagline: A fully private & offline location based music journal app
products.summaryZh: 一款完全私密且离线的基于位置的音乐日记应用
products.descriptionZh: Reverie FM 将你人生的配乐绘制成地图。我开发它，是因为我想记住的不仅是自己身在何处，还有当时在听什么。它让你把歌曲钉在地图的特定位置，为那些地点附上情绪与回忆。它完全私密、本地化，专为 Apple Music 打造。这是一份属于我的个人地图集，记录着我曾听过的歌，以及那些让我想起它们的所在。
products.description: Reverie FM maps your life's soundtrack. I built it because I wanted to remember not just where I was, but what I was listening to. It lets you pin songs to specific places on a map, attaching moods and memories to those spots. It's completely private, local, and built for Apple Music. It's a personal atlas of the songs that I was and the locations that remind me of them.

products.name: GentleCase—Built for Immigration Firms
products.tagline: Immigration case management, without the chaos
products.summaryZh: 移民案件管理，告别混乱。
products.descriptionZh: GentleCase 是为美国律所打造的移民案件管理软件，涵盖客户档案、案件追踪、签证模板、截止日期提醒，以及客户真正会使用的品牌化客户门户。
products.description: GentleCase is immigration case management software built for U.S. law firms — client profiles, case tracking, visa templates, deadline alerts, and a branded client portal your clients will actually use.

products.name: Cyra PCOS
products.tagline: AI cycle tracker built for PCOS patterns
products.summaryZh: 专为PCOS模式设计的AI周期追踪器
products.descriptionZh: Cyra PCOS 追踪不规则周期、症状、饮食、睡眠、运动和用药情况，然后利用 Claude AI 呈现每周 PCOS 模式、胰岛素抵抗信号、可供医生使用的 PDF 报告，以及实时聊天功能，且不预设 28 天周期。
products.description: Cyra PCOS tracks irregular cycles, symptoms, meals, sleep, exercise, and medication, then uses Claude AI to surface weekly PCOS patterns, insulin-resistance signals, doctor-ready PDF reports, and real-time chat without assuming a 28-day cycle.
